# This file was generated by muscomp. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)

qt_add_executable(muscovite_harbor_qml_app
    main.cpp
)

qt_add_qml_module(muscovite_harbor_qml_app
    URI "com.MuscoviteHarbor.app"
    VERSION 1.0
    QML_FILES
        main.qml
)

target_link_libraries(muscovite_harbor_qml_app PRIVATE
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Quick
    Qt6::Qml
    vessel_traffic_qml_viewmodels
    cargo_operations_qml_viewmodels
    passenger_terminal_qml_viewmodels
    intermodal_transfer_qml_viewmodels
    cargo_decomposition_qml_viewmodels
    harbour_control_qml_viewmodels
)

target_include_directories(muscovite_harbor_qml_app PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../vessel_traffic/qt/qml
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../cargo_operations/qt/qml
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../passenger_terminal/qt/qml
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../intermodal_transfer/qt/qml
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../cargo_decomposition/qt/qml
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../harbour_control/qt/qml
)

qt_import_qml_modules(muscovite_harbor_qml_app)
